feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Uploading Attachments via API
entry.content:
I am trying to upload a document, and attach it to a user's profile. The upload is successful and can be retrieved from the API using its ID, however I cannot find the file in the document manager, nor elsewhere in the UI. 

I have attached the sample body i am sending here:

im performing this action via the /odata/v2/Attachment endpoint

Thanks for any help

entry.title: SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-Roth Contributions Effective January 1, 2026
entry.content:
Hi All, could you please let me know below requirement would be addressed by HRSP Yearend update or it requires any configuration 

SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-Roth Contributions Effective January 1, 2026 

Beginning on January 1, 2026, employees who earned over $145,000 from the previous calendar year (in 2025), will have to make 401(k) Catch-up contributions into a Roth account, meaning all contributions need to be made on a post-tax basis.  The $145,000 in earnings should be based on FICA Wages.

 

The 401(k) mandatory post-tax catch-up contributions will only affect employees that meet these two main requirements:

  1. Have earned more than $145,000 in the previous calendar year (2025), and
  2. Be 50 years of age or older.

 

If an employee meets the two criteria above, then all catch-up contributions will need to be made as Roth contributions/after-tax basis. All other employees that do NOT meet these two requirements, will be exempt from the Roth contribution requirement.

entry.title: SAP SF EC TIME MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP SF EC Time Management, when an employee applies for leave, the request should go to their manager and get approved — how can this be achieved?

entry.title: One SF EC Instance mapped to two different S4 Hana system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our customer want;s to replication mapping with one SF instance with two different S4 HANA systems

entry.title: Technical error no. 57
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I get the following error when executing PT60 for one of the employee.

STOP: No rule under key $ Z401A***** Technical error no. 57 31.12.2024 Processing terminated for EE 23120567 Girish Kumar

Please find the PCR details.

Kindly suggest on what went wrong in the PCR.

Thanks in advance.

Sai

entry.title: Job Classification Change - Synch to Position
entry.content:
Hello -- we have encountered situations where updating a job classification does synch to the position(s).  This behavior seemed to have started after one of the recent upgrades.  So the question to the community is: why are the positions are not syncing when job classifications are updated?  

I read in another community post that there is no standard trigger from Job Classification to Position.  

If you've had this same issue, what solution did you come up with so that job classification would syncing to the position information?

Thank you -- BK

entry.title: SAP HR PG713 message
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change PG713 message type as information message. How can I do this?

entry.title: Fiori App 4988 - Team Member Authorization Status
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding the topic Team Member Authorization Status. We have created a team for PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) Plant Maintenance ( PM ). However, we receive the message that no chekc has been performed for the team members -> Check Not Performed

And my question now is, how can we perform this check so that this Check Not Performed no longer comes up? Is it possible that it is because it is actually a public cloud app, as described in the SAP Fiori Reference Libary https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4988')/S34 ?

Best regards Dominik

entry.title: CPF for recurring allowance is calculated for full month irrespective of IT0186 change
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

IT14 Recurring allowance is not prorated when there is split in IT0186 for SG payroll.

For Example, Basic pay (OW) in IT0008 of $5,000 and Housing allowance (OW) in IT0014 of $1,000.
1) Staff obtained PR (Converted from foreigner to PR-Permanent Resident) which is effective from 16th Jan and IT0186 is updated for Jan'25 as follows
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 EXEMPT
16.01.2025 to 31.12.9999 PR
2) Upon running Jan'25 payroll, there is a split in basic pay due to IT0186 change and is prorated as follows
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 $5000/31*15 = $2,400 (approx) -> No CPF > Correct
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 $5000/31*16 = $2,600 (approx) -> subjected to CPF > correct
3) But the same is not applied for Recurring Housing allowance. There is no split and all $1,000 is subjected to CPF. 

 We are using the standard schema R000.  Please advise why recurring allowances are not split for CPF (IT0186)? Thanks

DM

entry.title: When an employee is terminated and again rehired,the old termination record cannot be seen in pa20.
entry.content:
When an employee is terminated and again rehired, the old termination record cannot be seen in the system.

We want the termination action to be reflected in pa20.

Action type -13 is the termination action. Do we need to add anything here.. Can someone help us on this

entry.title: Future dated onboardees cannot be searched via Inactive search in Employee File
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

When we complete the hiring process for any onboardee with the hire date in future, the onboardee does not appear in the Inactive Search done through employee file.

If we uncheck this box - Hide External Users from Search Results through Company and Logo Settings, the onboardees start appearing in the global search header.

Is there a way that the future dated onboardees are searchable only through inactive search and not through global search header?
We do not want the inactive employees or the external onboardees to be visible in the global search header. We only want them to be visible through Inactive search through Employee file.

entry.title: Replacement C_THR12_2025 Certification HCM for other
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I would like to know if the C_THR12_2025 Certification: SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP HCM for S/4HANA is replaced by any other certification, for example, C_HCMP_2311 SAP Certified Associate - SAP HCM Payroll for SAP S/4HANA which includes HCM + Payroll.

Thank you.

entry.title: Cost Distribution
entry.content:
Hi SAP Professionals,

I am currently facing an issue with cost distribution in SAP HCM. Despite accurate maintenance of Infotype 0027 (Cost Distribution), the system appears to disregard this data during the payroll posting run, resulting in no impact on the SAP payroll posting.

HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: Training and Event Management: Attendee list Not creating
entry.content:
Dear Professional,

I have completed the configuration and all the things required for Training module, but when i am trying to book/create the attendee list via PV07. it takes around 5 minutes to buffer, and gives me ABAP runtime error. I think i am doing the right process:

Its urgent.

Thanks,

Marium khan

 

HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: currency in comp information portlets
entry.content:
Hi Team 

We have a requirement , where for a particular country ( Turkey) the Base pay  and other pay components are paid both in local currency and Euros.  For some employee the base pay  in Euro and other pay components are in Local currency, while for other employees the base pay in local currency and other pay components are in Euros. The Requirements is that , the compensation portlets should be displayed based on the base currency and even if the other pay components is not is as same as base currency.

For example if an employee as Base pay  in Euro and other components in Local currency, even the local currency should be displayed in Euros ( After exchange rates) , similarly if an employee as Base pay  in Local currency  and other components in Euro , even the local currency should be displayed in local currency ( After exchange rates) .

 

Just want to is it feasible to display in comp info portlets based on base pay currency

 

Regards

Kamesh Rangarajan

entry.title: Hardcoding users in transformation logic of IPS to provide access for SAC Reporting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to hardcode users in IPS to grant access to Story Reports. Earlier, we were using the sf.user.filter in the properties and added the respective usernames there. But there are more than 100 users now to be hardcoded and we cannot continue to add in this filter because of the character limit.

Can anybody give an idea if this hardcoding for providing access to SAC reporting can be done via transformation logic of source/target system?

What code can be added to hardcode such users?

Thanks in advance for your response.

entry.title: Story report - access and filtering
entry.content:
I'm still getting my head around story reports so bear with me here. 

If we create a dashboard for managers to see their teams info then thats easy, thats fine, I've no problems there.

However I'm trying to create story reports with summaries of information for the whole business for certain managers but when I share with the manager they can only see their direct team on the report instead of the whole company. 

I was told to play with scope filtering but this doesn't seem to help. I don't know much about role based permissions etc and am not particularly techy so does anyone have any suggestions I can use to explain to the person in my team that does deal with SF permissions... that person doesn't have anything to do with Report Stories so I want to translate the issue into the right terminology for them.

Thanks

entry.title: H1_2025 P4 | Manage Pending Hire RBP permission issue
entry.content:
is there other customers impacted by these change in Production regarding RBP permission

Manage Pending Hire

These RBP permission is not taken into consideration so HR people having these Role don't see the scope of People they are expected to see. Count for Hirable Candidate for Recruiting Remains to ZERO instead of showing all the candidates that are matching these condition.

entry.title: XNAB enhancement
entry.content:
How can we do enhancement in XNAB to split the records as per custom logic as per below. This is in the international version (99). We only need to do enhancement no configuration possible due to client setup. We have only one Valuation rule and need to split as below using BADI or any enhancement.

        Full Pay for the first 15 days – Valuation rule 01 

        Half pay for the next 20 days – Valuation rule 05 

        No pay after 35 days – Valuation rule 04

entry.title: Business partner in Human resources, field override
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are synching our employees into business partners now in an S4 Hana on prem.

I have noticed that the user department in SU01 is synched from the long text of the org. unit, and we would like change it for the SHORT text of the org unit.

I have been checking enhancement spot /SHCM/B_EE_BP_SYNC, and I can see a lot fields in there, but I can't find the department.

When the user is synched, I can see the department is taken from field WORKPLACE from ADDRESS_DATA_CORE, but I cannot find it in the Badi/Spot.

Any guiding light to check if this can be done wihout an implicit enhancement?

Thanks,

Pablo.
